overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking and running through a wilderness trail as day transitions to night. The character carries a rifle and bat on their back while navigating past a dead body and toward distant mountains with smoke rising in the background.

events.description: dead body discovered lying on left side of trail
black smoke plume becomes visible rising from distant forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt trail with rifle and bat strapped to back, surveying surroundings

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree trunk with sprawling branches beside trail
distant mountain peaks under heavy overcast sky
fallen person in dark clothing lying beside the path
worn dirt path winding through wilderness terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide wilderness trail under an overcast sky, passing a massive ancient tree on the left. Around the 12-second mark, a dead body comes into view beside the trail, and shortly after, black smoke becomes visible rising from the distant forest ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain vista with golden hour lighting

events.description: sunlight breaks through clouds illuminating mountain peaks with warm golden light

agents.ego_description: continuing along trail toward sunlit mountains, moving past the deceased individual

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak illuminated by warm golden sunlight breaking through clouds

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the scene opens into a mountain vista where golden sunlight breaks through the overcast sky to illuminate distant peaks. The trail remains wide and open, with the ancient tree and dead body now behind as the character advances toward the sunlit mountains.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the trail
ambient light drops significantly as dusk settles into deep blue hour

agents.ego_description: breaking into a run through the trail as darkness falls, weapons bouncing on back

entered.detail: thick cluster of evergreen trees lining both sides of the path
large boulders and rocky terrain beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character begins running as the environment transitions into deep blue hour with significantly reduced visibility. The trail becomes more enclosed by dense pine forest and rocky outcrops while the sunlit mountain peaks fade from view behind.

agents.ego_description: sprinting through dark rocky terrain with limited visibility, navigating by trail

entered.detail: steep rock wall rising immediately beside the left side of trail

segments.scene_description: In near-total darkness, the character continues running through a narrow rocky canyon. A steep cliff face rises on the left while the trail winds through the enclosed terrain, with the dense forest now behind and only the rocky walls visible in the dim light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wilderness trail that transforms from an overcast day into a dark, enclosed canyon. It begins with the character walking past a massive ancient tree and a dead body under a gray sky, as black smoke begins to rise from the distant forest ahead. As the character advances, the scene opens into a mountain vista where golden sunlight breaks through the clouds to illuminate distant peaks. The environment then shifts into the deep blue hour as the character begins running, with the open vista fading behind and the trail becoming enclosed by dense pine forests and rocky outcrops. Finally, the lighting drops into near-total darkness as the character sprints through a narrow rocky canyon with a steep cliff face rising on the left.
